description_long: This is a large, single-story bungalow with a sprawling footprint and a prominent circular driveway at the front, bordered by low hedges. The structure features a dark, multi-gabled roof and light-colored exterior walls, with several large windows distributed across the facade. The main entrance is accentuated by a covered porch, and the building is surrounded by paved walkways and driveways, suggesting ample access for vehicles. The rear of the bungalow includes a spacious backyard area, partially enclosed by hedges, and additional paved surfaces. The overall design is symmetrical, with the central section slightly elevated and flanked by two extended wings. The property is landscaped with small shrubs and flowerbeds, enhancing its residential appeal.
description: A large, single-story bungalow with a dark gabled roof, light exterior walls, a circular driveway, and symmetrical wings, surrounded by hedges and paved areas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular driveway, main entrance with porch, and symmetrical wings.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyard area, paved surfaces, and the back of the bungalow.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the length of the bungalow, rear hedges, and the back entrance.
description_view_3: Angled side view showing the circular driveway, side facade, and part of the backyard.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with grouped side windows
